title: Position-loss pressure
summary: Use position change and current track position as indicators of tactical urgency.
rationale: Position and position-change transforms were retained broadly. Losing positions on old or degrading tyres can precede a pit decision, while gaining positions may reduce urgency.
implementation_hint: Add absolute position change, lost-position amount, gained-position amount, position percentile within race-lap field, and interactions between lost positions, old-for-compound, and positive lap-time delta.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Position change can reflect pit cycles already underway rather than tyre condition; combine with current pit and fresh-tyre indicators.
